understanding.goal_understanding: Reach the goal gem tile marked '+' to complete the level and eventually win the game.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement is grid-based with gravity pulling downward. Each step or action consumes 1 turn. MOVE actions shift the player 1 tile horizontally (or vertically if gravity changes). CLICK actions target specific coordinates; clicking a clickable tile removes it and may cause the player to fall due to gravity. Spike tiles end the run on contact. Each level provides 2 attempts with 50 turns each; failing restarts the level.

understanding.goal_understanding: Reach the goal gem tile marked '+' to complete the level and eventually win the game.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement is grid-based with gravity pulling downward. Each step or action consumes 1 turn. MOVE actions shift the player 1 tile horizontally (or vertically if gravity changes). CLICK actions target specific coordinates; clicking a clickable tile removes it and may cause the player to fall due to gravity. Spike tiles end the run on contact. Each level provides 2 attempts with 50 turns each; failing restarts the level.
